serviceDescription: These data describe the approximate project location and financial elements of US Forest Service, Great American Outdoors Act (GAOA) projects that are implemented through a Grant and/or Agreement. Data is visible at all scales and zoom levels.
description: These data describe the approximate project location and financial elements of US Forest Service, Great American Outdoors Act (GAOA) projects that are implemented through a Grant and/or Agreement. Data is visible at all scales and zoom levels.Please note the above map level metadata was current as of  Nov. 2023. Visit the  always-up-to-data metadata for the latest Publication Date, Summary and Descriptions within the <idPurp>,  <idPurp>, <idAbs> tags respectively.
copyrightText: USDA Forest Service Enterprise Map Services Program, Enterprise Data Warehouse

documentInfo.Subject: This feature class (sourced from existing Forest Service databases) provides summary level information on FS GAOA project grants and agreements for external accomplishment reporting.
